section_name: Restoration of Certain Expired Eminent Domain Authority
text:
(a) This section applies only to a district:

(1) whose authority to exercise the power of eminent domain under Section 172.157 (Eminent Domain) expired under Section 2206.101 (Report of Eminent Domain Authority; Expiration of Authority) (c), Government Code; and

(2) that is located in a county adjacent to a county in which there is located a port authority that has the authority to issue a permit for the movement of oversize or overweight vehicles under Subchapter O or P, Chapter 623 (Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) .

(b) Notwithstanding the expiration of the district’s authority as described by Subsection (a), the district, on and after September 1, 2015, may exercise the power of eminent domain in accordance with Section 172.157 (Eminent Domain) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.1571 — Restoration of Certain Expired Eminent Domain Authority

(a) This section applies only to a district:

    (1) whose authority to exercise the power of eminent domain under Section 172.157 (Eminent Domain) expired under Section 2206.101 (Report of Eminent Domain Authority; Expiration of Authority) (c), Government Code; and

    (2) that is located in a county adjacent to a county in which there is located a port authority that has the authority to issue a permit for the movement of oversize or overweight vehicles under Subchapter O or P, Chapter 623 (Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles) .

(b) Notwithstanding the expiration of the district’s authority as described by Subsection (a), the district, on and after September 1, 2015, may exercise the power of eminent domain in accordance with Section 172.157 (Eminent Domain) .

*Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 381 (H.B.1422), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2015.*
